case_title: THOMAS DEBRA ANDERSON VS CITY TOW

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY THOMAS DEBRA ANDERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CITY TOW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THOMAS DEBRA ANDERSON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY TOW STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE AS TO CITY TOW INVALID, NO DATE OF DELIVERY RECORDED.
